behavior_changes.title: Bug 37298528 - MySQL: Make TRANLOGOPTIONS TRACKSCHEMACHANGES enabled by default
behavior_changes.description: Enhanced TRANLOGOPTIONS TRACKSCHEMACHANGES option to be enabled by default.

behavior_changes.title: Bug 37539434: Oracle - All Replicats without checkpoints are desupported
behavior_changes.description: The creation of integrated and classic Replicat without checkpoint tables is not supported in Oracle AI Database . Additionally, any Replicats that were created without the checkpoint tables, will not start successfully.

behavior_changes.title: Bug 35569409: PostgreSQL - Use Microservices Architecture task scheduler to update the heartbeat tables instead of relying on cron job
behavior_changes.description: Configured an Administration Service task to update the heartbeat table to avoid replying on the cron job to do it.
